Only 30% of our food is produced in this country ... Why is no politician addressing this problem ? Why are our green fields being eroded rapidly ?

Residents are in uproar over plans to build a £3billion data centre outside their tiny Kent village.  Locals in Southfleet received letters through their doors last week revealing that land currently used for fruit growing has been earmarked for the proposed Ebbsfleet AI Data Centre.  Sprawling across 145 acres, the data centre would be one of the largest in the UK. It is deemed to be of such national importance that the developers are going straight to the Government for permission instead of seeking approval from the local council.
  • 1k comments
  • 1 video

Three sons to be proud of, well done. Mum raised strong empathic boys, who turned into a force to be reckoned with.

When one of Michael Porter's brothers rang to say their mother had gone missing on the Greek island of Crete, he knew instinctively something terrible had happened. 'My mind jumped to a worst-case scenario - I didn't know what it was but I knew it was bad,' he says. Nonetheless, Michael could never have imagined that moment would mark the start of a near two-decade quest for justice that is only now approaching a resolution. For while 53-year-old Jean Hanlon's body was recovered from Heraklion harbour in March 2009 with head injuries and other signs of trauma, police ruled her death was a tragic accident.

  • share Jean went for a drink with man in Crete and was never seen alive again

I lost 10 pounds in 9mins on the Grand National.

Having tried every diet available, and still ending up a size 20, I gave up pointless regimes in my late 30s, when I wrote a book called 'Fat, So?', about how dieting actually makes us fat. Since then, I've just tried to eat healthily. That means eschewing ultra-processed food and cooking from scratch. In my case, it also means being seduced by the array of posh but extremely pricey healthy ingredients out there. I've spent a small fortune on the likes of quinoa, chia seeds, kombucha and matcha tea, with very small change in my figure - now, thanks largely to Pilates, a size 16-18 - and absolutely no loose change left in my wallet .
  • 11 comments
  • share I lost 10lb in five weeks on the £1 a meal diet

A vast illegal 7,500-tonne waste dump has been found yards away from a former Premier League football stadium. Shocking drone images show household and commercial rubbish strewn across a 50-metre strip of land in Bradford, West Yorkshire. One of the reasons - the MANY reasons - councils across the country are going bankrupt

Britain's first 'gull ranger' has started work to improve human and seagull relations. Patrick Safford, 24, is set to teach people in Eyemouth, Scotland how to have better interactions and 'avoid conflict' with the seabirds. The unusual position managed by the Berwickshire Marine Reserve was created after several people suffered seagull attacks, with seven child victims in August 2024.

The little owl had been perched on a branch alongside its three siblings in the Coesfeld district of Munsterland, Germany. But it lost its balance and tumbled from the branch, flailing its legs and hanging upside down.
